label: Human Approval
description: Pause the workflow until a configured approver accepts or rejects. The engine returns control downstream once an approval decision is recorded, or applies the configured timeout action if the timeout elapses first.

settings.name: approvers
settings.label: Approvers
settings.description: Array of user ids or group names allowed to approve. Combine with notificationChannels for richer routing.

settings.name: requiredCount
settings.label: Required approvals
settings.description: Number of approvers that must approve before the workflow resumes.

settings.name: timeout
settings.label: Timeout (seconds)
settings.description: How long to wait for a decision before applying the timeoutAction (default 24h).

settings.name: timeoutAction
settings.label: Timeout action
settings.description: What to do when the timeout elapses without a decision.

settings.name: message
settings.label: Approval prompt
settings.placeholder: Please review the drafted content and approve or reject with feedback.
settings.description: Prompt the reviewer sees in the UI / notification. Templating is supported.

settings.name: notificationChannels
settings.label: Notification channels
settings.description: Channels to notify approvers on. Any combination of email / slack / teams / in_app.

ai.shortDescription: Pause for a human-in-the-loop approval before continuing.
ai.whenToUse: When a workflow step has irreversible side-effects (production writes, customer messages, money movement) and a human must approve first.
ai.examplePrompt: before sending the email, require an admin approval
ai.promptHints: Reference the decision via {{steps.<id>.status}}. Use timeout for SLAs and timeoutAction='reject' for fail-closed defaults.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_message
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Approval node returned an empty message — the reviewer would see a blank prompt. Configure a message or rely on the auto-generated default.
